title: Custom Travel Neoprene Vanity Case with Handle | OEM Beauty Case Manufacturer
seoTitle: Custom Neoprene Travel Vanity Case | OEM Beauty Case Manufacturer
description:
Designed for travelers who value both organization and style, this structured neoprene vanity case provides dedicated space for cosmetics, skincare products, toiletries, and personal essentials. The rigid silhouette helps protect items during transport while keeping the bag looking neat and elegant.

A dual-zipper opening allows the case to open widely, giving users a clear view of the contents and making it easy to access products. The integrated top handle offers comfortable portability whether carried by hand or packed inside a suitcase.

Manufactured with premium neoprene, this beauty case combines softness with resilience. The smooth exterior is easy to maintain, while the padded construction provides additional protection for bottles, palettes, and beauty accessories.

O'lay Technology Co., Ltd offers complete OEM and ODM solutions, enabling brands to customize every detail including logo application, dimensions, colors, interior compartments, zipper hardware, and premium packaging.
seoDescription: Premium neoprene travel vanity cases manufactured by O'lay Technology Co., Ltd. OEM & ODM beauty case solutions with custom logos, colors, compartments and retail packaging for global brands.
